system.effect: The character suffers −10 to Weapon Skill tests. Melee attackers gain +10 to hit them. Ranged attackers suffer −10 to hit them at range. Standing up costs a Half Action.
system.removal: The character may spend a Half Action to stand up.

description.value: The character is on the ground. They suffer −10 to Weapon Skill tests. Melee attacks against a Prone target gain +10 to hit, while ranged attacks against a Prone target at more than 2 metres suffer −10 to hit. A Prone character may stand as a Half Action. A Prone character who wishes to move without standing can only crawl at a rate of one metre per Half Action.
